footer.tagline: The AI-native IDE for every platform. 131 tools, 5 platforms, one protocol.

hero.subtitle: Orchestra connects your AI agents to a unified plugin backbone over QUIC + Protobuf with mTLS. One protocol, every tool, any AI.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your team needs more.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Perfect for solo developers and open source projects.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For teams building production AI-native applications.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Custom deployments, SLAs, and dedicated support.

features.title: Everything built in
features.subtitle: No glue code. No middleware. Just ship.

aiTools.title: 131 AI Tools
aiTools.desc: Projects, features, RAG memory, search, agents — all callable via MCP protocol from any AI client.

quicMesh.title: QUIC Plugin Mesh
quicMesh.desc: All plugins communicate over QUIC + Protobuf with mTLS. Sub-millisecond latency, zero config.

ragMemory.title: RAG Memory Engine
ragMemory.desc: Tantivy full-text search + SQLite vector storage. Rust-powered. Your AI remembers everything.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
multiAgent.desc: Parallel agents, sessions, provider routing across Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama, DeepSeek.

platforms.title: 5 Platforms
platforms.desc: macOS, Windows, Linux desktop apps. Chrome extension. iOS and Android mobile. One backend.

packs.title: 17 Official Packs
packs.desc: Install skills, agents, and hooks with one command. Marketplace with 17 packs ready to go.

landing.toolsTitle: Every tool your AI agent needs
landing.toolsDesc: From project management to RAG memory to web search — all exposed as MCP tools callable by any AI client.
landing.pluginDesc: 4 core plugins ship inside the 17MB binary. Optional plugins install on demand. In-process routing means zero network overhead locally.
landing.pluginBullet4: Go + Rust + Swift + Kotlin + C# plugins
landing.ragDesc: Built in Rust with Tantivy for full-text search and SQLite for vector storage. Index your entire codebase in seconds.
landing.multiAgentDesc: Define agents, build workflows, run them in parallel or sequence. Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama — all under one API.
landing.multiAgentBullet3: Provider routing: deepseek, qwen, kimi, grok, perplexity
landing.platformsSubtitle: One backend, five native client experiences.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join developers building AI-native applications. Free forever to start.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: News, engineering deep-dives, and tutorials from the Orchestra team.
blog.fromTheBlogSubtitle: Latest news, tutorials, and engineering deep-dives.

solutions.title: Built for every team
solutions.subtitle: Whether you're building AI systems, shipping features, or running enterprise infrastructure — Orchestra has you covered.

aiEngineers.title: For AI Engineers
aiEngineers.subtitle: Build intelligent systems, not infrastructure.
aiEngineers.uc1Desc: Index codebases, documents, and conversations with Tantivy + SQLite vector search. No separate vector database required.
aiEngineers.uc2Desc: Route work to Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama, or DeepSeek based on task type. Compare outputs across providers with one call.
aiEngineers.uc3Desc: save_memory, search_memory, save_observation — your agents remember past sessions and build context over time.

devTeams.title: For Dev Teams
devTeams.subtitle: AI-native project management that ships.
devTeams.uc1Desc: 34 tools for managing features from backlog through documentation and review. Full audit trail in markdown — no database required.
devTeams.uc2Desc: Multiple AI agents work simultaneously on different features. WIP limits, dependency graphs, and assignee filters keep work organized.
devTeams.uc3Desc: Enforce coding standards, review checklists, and deployment patterns via installable skill packs. One command, entire team aligned.

enterprise.title: For Enterprise
enterprise.subtitle: Self-hosted, compliant, and extensible.
enterprise.uc1Desc: Run Orchestra entirely on your infrastructure. No data leaves your environment. Full control over plugins, models, and storage.
enterprise.uc2Desc: Build proprietary plugins in Go, Rust, Swift, Kotlin, or C#. Integrate internal tools, databases, and APIs via the plugin SDK.
enterprise.uc3Desc: SAML/OIDC integration, role-based access control, audit logs, and compliance reporting built in.

solutions.notSureSubtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No credit card required.

marketplace.title: Pack Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Install curated skills, agents, and hooks with one command.
marketplace.buildYourOwnDesc: Publish skills, agents, and hooks to the marketplace. Reach every Orchestra user.

download.title: Download Orchestra
download.subtitle: Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Or install via CLI.
download.installScriptDesc: Works on macOS and Linux. Installs the orchestra binary to /usr/local/bin.

contact.subtitle: Questions, enterprise inquiries, or just want to say hello.

contact.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Orchestra. These terms govern your access to and use of Orchestra MCP and its services.
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using Orchestra MCP ("Orchestra", "the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site. The materials contained in this website are protected by applicable copyright and trademark law.
terms.s2Body: Permission is granted to temporarily use Orchestra for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title. Under this license you may not: modify or copy the materials; use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display; attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained in Orchestra; remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or transfer the materials to another person or mirror the materials on any other server.
terms.s3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password. Orchestra cannot and will not be liable for any loss or damage from your failure to comply with this security obligation. You are responsible for all content posted and activity that occurs under your account. You must not use the Service to violate any laws in your jurisdiction.
terms.s4Body: Orchestra does not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Service (or any part thereof) with or without notice. You agree that Orchestra shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the Service.
terms.s5Body: Orchestra provides tools that interface with AI language models. The outputs generated by AI models through Orchestra are not endorsed by Orchestra. You are solely responsible for how you use AI-generated content. Orchestra is not liable for any decisions made based on AI outputs. You agree to comply with the terms of service of any AI provider you connect through Orchestra.
terms.s6Body: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with our Privacy Policy. You retain all rights to data you upload to the Service. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
terms.s7Body: Access to the Orchestra API is subject to rate limiting and fair use policies. Automated access to the Service must comply with our API documentation. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate API access for abuse, excessive usage, or violation of these terms.
terms.s8Body: In no event shall Orchestra or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use Orchestra. Because some jurisdictions do not allow limitations on implied warranties, or limitations of liability for consequential or incidental damages, these limitations may not apply to you.
terms.s9Body: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location. Any dispute arising in connection with these Terms shall be resolved by binding arbitration.
terms.s10Body: Orchestra reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or by posting a notice on the Service. Your continued use of the Service after any changes to these Terms constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms of Service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Orchestra is designed privacy-first. Your API keys never leave your device. Local mode keeps all data on your machine. Cloud sync is always opt-in.
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This includes: account information (name, email, password); usage data (features used, commands run, session duration); project data you choose to store in our cloud services; and communication data when you contact us.
privacy.s2Body: We use the information we collect to: provide, maintain, and improve our services; process transactions and send related information; send technical notices and support messages; respond to your comments and questions; monitor and analyze usage patterns to improve user experience; detect and prevent fraudulent transactions and other illegal activities; and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3Body: Your data is stored on infrastructure hosted in the United States. We use industry-standard encryption (TLS in transit, AES-256 at rest) to protect your data. Orchestra does not store AI provider API keys — these are stored locally on your device or in your environment's secret management system. We employ mTLS authentication between all internal services.
privacy.s4Body: Orchestra is designed with a privacy-first architecture. When running Orchestra locally (orchestra serve), all data stays on your machine by default. Cloud sync is opt-in. Self-hosted enterprise deployments can configure Orchestra to never connect to external services. API keys for AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.) are stored locally in your environment and are never transmitted to Orchestra servers.
privacy.s5Body: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may share data with: service providers who assist in our operations (hosting, analytics, email) under strict confidentiality agreements; law enforcement when required by law; and successor entities in the event of a merger or acquisition, with advance notice to users.
privacy.s6Body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or indicate when a cookie is being sent. We use analytics services to understand how the service is used. You can opt out of analytics tracking in your account settings.
privacy.s7Body: You have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you; correct inaccurate data; request deletion of your account and associated data; export your data in a machine-readable format; opt out of marketing communications at any time; and lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy.s8Body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. If you delete your account, we will delete your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required by law to retain it longer. Project data stored in our cloud services will be deleted within 90 days of account deletion.
privacy.s9Body: Orchestra does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy.s10Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. For material changes, we will send an email notification to the address associated with your account.

docs.introDesc: Orchestra is an AI-native IDE platform that connects your AI agents to a unified plugin backbone. 290 tools, 36 plugins, 17 packs, 5 platforms, one protocol.
docs.whatIsDesc: Orchestra solves the fragmentation problem in AI tooling. Instead of gluing together separate tools for project management, vector search, agent orchestration, and file storage, Orchestra provides all of these as MCP-compatible tools via a unified plugin mesh.
docs.installDesc: Install Orchestra using the install script (recommended) or download a platform-specific binary.
docs.quickStartDesc: Get Orchestra running and connected to your AI client in under 5 minutes.
docs.readyMsg: Orchestra is running. Your AI client now has access to 290 tools across project management, RAG memory, agent orchestration, and more.
docs.comingSoonMsg: This documentation page is coming soon. Check our GitHub for the latest updates.
